taxonomy: Chytroma manaosensis is a species of fungus in the genus Chytroma and family Chytridiaceae. It belongs to the kingdom Fungi, phylum Chytridiomycota, and class Chytridiomycetes. The kingdom Fungi is a large group of organisms that includes mushrooms, molds, and yeasts. Chytridiomycota is a phylum of fungi characterized by the presence of a flagellum on the sperm cells. Chytroma manaosensis is a saprotrophic fungus, obtaining its nutrients from dead or decaying organic matter.
